name: Macro Oracle
description: Autonomous macro data oracle. Structured macroeconomic data for AI agents — Brazil (BCB, IBGE, COPOM) and global central banks (Fed, ECB, BoJ). Pay-per-call via x402 in USDC on Base.

endpoints.description: SELIC current rate + Focus expectations + next COPOM date + historical surprises
IPCA realized + Focus expectations + next release date + historical surprises
COPOM calendar + implied probabilities of cut / hold / hike
Full Focus snapshot: IPCA, SELIC, GDP, FX + weekly changes + signal_for_agents
Brazil macro surprise index (z-score vs consensus) + polymarket_relevance score
Next 30 days: FOMC, ECB, BoJ, BCB, NFP, CPI with consensus and probabilities
Fed: current rate + CME FedWatch probabilities + dot plot + historical surprises
Macro surprises last 30 days for US/EU/BR/JP/CN + polymarket_signals
